commands.review_summary:
The PR disposes the previous registered, unleased session MCP runtime when a sessionKey is rebound to a new sessionId, and adds regression coverage for rebind disposal and leased-runtime preservation.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +64. Total +76 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level reproduction is high confidence: current main can persist a new sessionId for the same sessionKey after compaction, then getOrCreate remaps that sessionKey while leaving the prior registered runtime alive until idle sweep. I did not execute the live WSL2/LadybugDB scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because the patch has no blocking review findings and the remaining action is normal maintainer review/merge judgment.
